title: anemonastrum rupestre
intro: Anemonastrum rupestre, also known as the Alpine Clematis or Rock Clematis, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues. Anemonastrum rupestre is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations have been used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems.
